content: JUDGE: The court has reviewed the forensic reports, digital evidence, and witness testimonies. The will is forged. The land record altered. The witness testimony of Mrs. Ghosh is discredited. The death of Ramesh Das is under murder investigation. The accused, Priya Chatterjee, is present. The prosecution has submitted the charge sheet. Defense counsel, Mr. Sen Gupta, argues that no direct evidence ties Priya to the poisoning. The court notes: the forged documents, the financial trail, the boundary tampering, and the motive are overwhelming. The defense has not produced any credible evidence to refute the forensic findings. The court declares Priya Chatterjee as the principal offender. Debashish Mukherjee is charged with corruption. Nandini Sen is declared absconding. The court orders arrest warrants for all accused. Hearing adjourned until 05/09/2023 for framing of charges.
